recalls.Description: HALO Dream has announced a recall of its Magic Sleepsuits, identified by batch codes PO30592, PO30641, and PO30685. These infant sleepsuits feature a shell and lining made from 100% cotton, with a fill of 100% polyester. Each sleepsuit includes double zippers on the front and is available in various colors and sizes. The product name is displayed on the front, and the batch codes along with 'Made in India' can be found on the sewn-in label inside the garment.
recalls.Title: HALO Dream Issues Recall for Magic Sleepsuits Due to Choking Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact HALO Dream at 833-791-0420, Monday to Friday from 9 a.m. to 4:30 p.m. ET, email customerservice@sleepsuitrecall.com, or visit www.sleepsuitrecall.com. You can also find more information by going to www.halosleep.com and clicking on 'Recalls' at the bottom of the page.

Images.Caption: Recalled HALO Magic Sleepsuit
The sewn in label with the batch code and "Made in India" circled
The hang tag with the batch code and "Made in India" circled

Injuries.Name: The firm has received 15 reports of the zipper head detaching from the garment. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Available at Halosleep.com, Amazon.com, Walmart.com, and Target.com from September 2025 to February 2026, priced around $50.

Importers.Name: HALO Dream, Inc., of New York City

Hazards.Name: Zipper head may detach, creating a choking hazard for infants.

Remedies.Name: Stop using the recalled sleepsuit immediately and visit http://www.sleepsuitrecall.com to participate in the recall. After registration, you will receive a coupon code for a replacement sleepsuit or a $50 store credit for other purchases. Keep the recalled sleepsuit until you receive your coupon code.

recalls.metaDescription: HALO Dream recalls Magic Sleepsuits due to a choking hazard. Learn how to get a replacement or store credit.

Umeyda has issued a recall for their children's 100% cotton short-sleeve nightgowns due to a serious burn risk. These nightgowns, available in various colors including black, purple, mint green, and more, come in sizes ranging from 4-5T to 13-14 years. They feature a pocket and buttons along the front, with identifying information printed on a side-seam label. The recall affects nightgowns that do not meet mandatory flammability standards for children's sleepwear, posing a significant safety concern for young wearers.

recalls.Description: Blossom is recalling its children's two-piece loungewear sets due to a serious fire hazard that could lead to burn injuries or even death. The sets include short-sleeved or long-sleeved button-up shirts with front pockets and matching shorts or pants. Available in various colors like white, navy, light blue, light pink, and lilac, the short-sleeved options feature designs such as fireworks, multi-stripes, tulips, and sailboats, while the long-sleeved versions come in 'letter to Santa' and 'Santa paws' designs. recalls.Description:
Marie-Chantal has issued a recall for several styles of children's nightgowns, pajama sets, and robes due to a serious burn hazard that violates federal flammability standards. The recalled nightgowns come in various prints, including birds, bunnies, and flowers, and are made from either 100% organic cotton or 100% pima cotton. The pajama sets and robes also feature playful designs and are available in sizes for children aged 2 to 10 years.

The pajama sets include options with kitten prints and angel wings, while the robes are available in color combinations of white and pink or blue. The garments are marked with the brand name "Marie-Chantal" and an RN number of 103490 on a sewn-in label. Parents are advised to stop using these items immediately due to the potential risk of serious injury or death.

recalls.Description:
Forever 21 has issued a recall for 20 styles of children's pajamas due to a serious burn hazard. These pajamas, which include eight pant styles, three short styles, and nine two-piece sets, were available in sizes 5/6, 7/8, 9/10, 11/12, and 13/14. Each garment features a label indicating the size and brand name, with the item number printed on a sewn-in label below the barcode.
